Title: Successfully add a new user with all valid details
Preconditions: 1. Database is initialized with basic_details table | 2. Backend server is running on port 5000 | 3. Frontend is running on port 3000 | 4. User is on Basic Details page (/basic-details)
Steps: 1. Enter valid name in the "Full Name" field | 2. Select a valid date in the "Date of Birth" field | 3. Enter complete address in the "Address" field | 4. Click "Add User" button | 5. Verify success message appears | 6. Verify form is cleared | 7. Verify new user appears in the table below
Test Data: Name: John Doe | DOB: 1990-01-15 | Address: 123 Main Street, New York, NY 10001
Expected Result: Success message "User added successfully!" is displayed | Form fields are cleared | New user appears at the top of the table with ID, name, DOB, address, and created date | Table user count increments by 1

Title: Complete user journey from landing page to adding basic details and viewing in table
Preconditions: 1. Database is initialized | 2. Backend server running | 3. Frontend running | 4. User is on landing page (/)
Steps: 1. Click "Basic Details" link in navigation | 2. Verify navigation to /basic-details page | 3. Fill in user name "Jane Smith" | 4. Select DOB "1985-06-20" | 5. Enter address "456 Park Avenue, Brooklyn, NY 11201" | 6. Click "Add User" | 7. Verify user added successfully | 8. Verify user appears in table | 9. Click "Back" button | 10. Verify navigation back to landing page
Test Data: Name: Jane Smith | DOB: 1985-06-20 | Address: 456 Park Avenue, Brooklyn, NY 11201
Expected Result: User successfully navigates through all pages | Data is submitted and persisted | User appears in table with correct details | Navigation works correctly in both directions

Title: Submit form with special characters in name and address
Preconditions: 1. User is on Basic Details page | 2. Form is empty
Steps: 1. Enter name with special characters "O'Brien-Smith Jr." | 2. Select DOB "1975-03-10" | 3. Enter address with special characters "789 St. Mary's Road, Apt #5B, Queens, NY 11375" | 4. Click "Add User" | 5. Verify submission success | 6. Verify data displayed correctly in table
Test Data: Name: O'Brien-Smith Jr. | DOB: 1975-03-10 | Address: 789 St. Mary's Road, Apt #5B, Queens, NY 11375
Expected Result: Form accepts special characters | Data is stored correctly | Table displays special characters without corruption

Title: Submit form with very long address
Preconditions: 1. User is on Basic Details page | 2. Form is empty
Steps: 1. Enter name "Michael Johnson" | 2. Select DOB "1992-11-25" | 3. Enter very long address (200+ characters) | 4. Click "Add User" | 5. Verify submission handling
Test Data: Name: Michael Johnson | DOB: 1992-11-25 | Address: 1234 Very Long Street Name That Goes On And On, Building Complex Name, Floor 15, Suite 2500, Some Very Long City Name, State With Long Name, ZIP 12345-6789, Additional Address Line Information Here That Makes It Even Longer
Expected Result: Long address is accepted and stored | Table displays address with proper text overflow handling (ellipsis or wrapping) | No UI breaking or data truncation issues

Title: Add multiple users and verify table displays all correctly
Preconditions: 1. User is on Basic Details page | 2. Database may have existing users
Steps: 1. Add first user with name "User One" DOB "2000-01-01" Address "Address 1" | 2. Wait for success message | 3. Add second user "User Two" DOB "2000-02-02" Address "Address 2" | 4. Wait for success message | 5. Add third user "User Three" DOB "2000-03-03" Address "Address 3" | 6. Verify all users appear in table | 7. Verify order (newest first)
Expected Result: All three users appear in the table | Most recent user appears at top (reverse chronological order) | Each user has unique ID | User count shows correct total | No duplicate entries

Title: View existing users when page loads with pre-populated data
Preconditions: 1. Database has at least 3 existing users in basic_details table | 2. Backend server running | 3. Navigate to /basic-details page
Steps: 1. Open /basic-details page | 2. Observe table loading state | 3. Verify table displays existing users | 4. Verify user count is correct | 5. Verify all columns display correctly
Expected Result: Loading spinner appears briefly | Table loads with all existing users | User count badge shows correct number | All fields (ID, Name, DOB, Address, Added On) display correctly | Dates are formatted properly

Title: Navigate to Basic Details page from landing page using navigation link
Preconditions: 1. User is on landing page (/) | 2. All pages are functional
Steps: 1. Locate "Basic Details" link in top navigation bar | 2. Click on "Basic Details" link | 3. Verify page navigation | 4. Verify URL changes to /basic-details | 5. Verify page content loads
Expected Result: Navigation link is visible in navbar | Click navigates to /basic-details route | Page loads with form and table | Browser URL updates correctly | Back button in browser works

Title: Submit form with empty name field
Preconditions: 1. User is on Basic Details page | 2. Form is empty
Steps: 1. Leave "Full Name" field empty | 2. Select DOB "1990-05-15" | 3. Enter address "123 Test St" | 4. Click "Add User" button | 5. Observe validation behavior
Expected Result: Error message "Name is required" is displayed | Form is not submitted | No API call is made | User data is not added to table | Form retains entered DOB and address

Title: Submit form with empty date of birth
Preconditions: 1. User is on Basic Details page | 2. Form is empty
Steps: 1. Enter name "Test User" | 2. Leave "Date of Birth" field empty | 3. Enter address "123 Test St" | 4. Click "Add User" button | 5. Observe validation behavior
Test Data: Name: Test User | Address: 123 Test St
Expected Result: Error message "Date of Birth is required" is displayed | Form is not submitted | No API call is made | User data is not added to table | Form retains entered name and address

Title: Submit form with empty address field
Preconditions: 1. User is on Basic Details page | 2. Form is empty
Steps: 1. Enter name "Test User" | 2. Select DOB "1990-05-15" | 3. Leave "Address" field empty | 4. Click "Add User" button | 5. Observe validation behavior
Expected Result: Error message "Address is required" is displayed | Form is not submitted | No API call is made | User data is not added to table | Form retains entered name and DOB

Title: Submit completely empty form
Preconditions: 1. User is on Basic Details page | 2. All form fields are empty
Steps: 1. Do not enter any data in any field | 2. Click "Add User" button directly | 3. Observe validation behavior
Expected Result: Error message "Name is required" is displayed (first validation error) | Form is not submitted | No API call is made | Table remains unchanged

Title: Test API endpoint failure handling
Preconditions: 1. User is on Basic Details page | 2. Backend API endpoint /api/basic-details is temporarily unavailable or returns 500 error
Steps: 1. Enter valid name "Error Test" | 2. Select valid DOB "1990-01-01" | 3. Enter valid address "123 Error St" | 4. Click "Add User" | 5. Simulate API failure (stop backend or mock error) | 6. Observe error handling
Expected Result: Error message is displayed (e.g., "An error occurred while adding user") | Form data is retained | User is not added to table | User can retry after fixing the issue | UI remains functional

Title: Test database table not initialized
Preconditions: 1. Database is running but basic_details table does not exist | 2. User is on Basic Details page
Steps: 1. Enter valid form data | 2. Click "Add User" | 3. Observe backend response | 4. Verify error handling
Expected Result: API returns error with code TABLE_NOT_FOUND | Frontend displays appropriate error message | User is informed to check database setup | Application does not crash

Title: Add user with future date of birth
Preconditions: 1. User is on Basic Details page
Steps: 1. Enter name "Future Person" | 2. Select a future date (e.g., 2030-01-01) in DOB field | 3. Enter address "Future Address" | 4. Click "Add User" | 5. Observe behavior
Test Data: Name: Future Person | DOB: 2030-01-01 | Address: Future Address
Expected Result: Form validation should ideally prevent future dates OR system accepts but flags as unusual | If accepted, data is stored and displayed correctly | Date formatting remains consistent

Title: Verify table behavior with no users (empty state)
Preconditions: 1. User is on Basic Details page | 2. Database basic_details table is empty
Steps: 1. Load /basic-details page | 2. Observe table area | 3. Verify empty state display
Expected Result: Empty state is displayed with icon and message "No users added yet" | Help text "Add your first user using the form above" is shown | User count shows "0 users" | No table rows are displayed | UI is clean and informative
